arts.ttl: ‘It’s going to be a massive ask’ - Dons boss makes League Two automatic promotion admission after Gillingham defeat
arts.sum: “We have a good opportunity to get promoted out of this league, but today is a missed opportunity – we’re really disappointed with how it went. Wimbledon have won just one of their last six League Two games and are four points from dropping outside of the play-offs.

arts.ttl: Joe Gbode effort enough as Gillingham dent Wimbledon’s promotion chances
arts.sum: Gills went in front just after the hour when Gbode produced a powerful effort from inside the box to beat Owen Goodman.

Gillingham have turned into draw specialists under new boss Gareth Ainsworth having now drawn seven of their last eight games. They are unbeaten in their last nine league games. Wimbledon's 0-0 draw ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Gillingham vs. AFC Wimbledon - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League Two clash between Gillingham and AFC Wimbledon, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: The lowdown on AFC Wimbledon 0 Chesterfield 0 - Dons move point closer to securing play-offs but must win Monday to keep automatic hopes alive
arts.sum: Neither side had a real clear-cut effort on goal in the second half, with Alistair Smith testing Boot from distance in the 83rd minute a chance of note. Bugiel thought he had given Jackson’s side the lead just before half-time when he met a header inside the area, but his effort stung the palms of Boot and Smith was unable to apply the finish on the rebound.
